name: Columbia Community Fitness Center
description: Columbia Community Fitness Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brooklyn, MI. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Crossroads Pickleball
description: Crossroads Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MI. There are 6 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: First Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at First Baptist Church in Brooklyn, MI! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hurst Foundation Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Hurst Foundation Pickleball Complex in Jackson, MI! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Drop in from dawn to dusk

name: Jackson Recreation Dept. Boos Center
description: Jackson Recreation Dept. Boos Center is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MI. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Jackson YMCA
description: Jackson YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Michigan Sports Facility
description: Michigan Sports Facility is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MI. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Sharp Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Sharp Park Tennis Courts in Jackson, MI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
